title: PC Jeweller South Asia Partners is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: PC Jeweller South Asia Partners is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with PC Jeweller South Asia Partners! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Gwalior team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About PC Jeweller South Asia Partners:
PC Jeweller South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PC Jeweller South Asia Partners!
